calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2002 Off Calendar

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-21-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

To Continue Abritration Or Remove Civil Case From Arb. Cal.
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Continue Arbitration is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to and including February 28, 2002. Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 3/21/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2001 Continued To Mar-21-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
